violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Excessive ice buildup in the walk in freezer. Ice on food boxes.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Clean plates and bowls on the salad bar and in the kitchen are not inverted.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Boxes of single serve cups on the floor in the back store room and in the barista.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust buildup on the ceiling vent in the back food prep area and by the vent hood.
